title: CXXRTL: "Assert `!for_debug' failed" caused by the "-noflatten" option

features.name: hierarchical module array instantiation with buffered wire output
features.description: Code should include a parent module instantiating a child module as an array, where the child module contains a buffered combinatorial wire output

features.name: intermediate wire connecting module array outputs to parent output
features.description: Code should include an intermediate unpacked wire connecting module array instance outputs before assignment to parent module output

features.name: cxxrtl_backend -noflatten with non_flattened_hierarchy
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical design processed with write_cxxrtl -noflatten option on module array instantiations
features.snippet:
read_verilog gen.v; hierarchy -check -top gen
write_cxxrtl -noflatten gen.cpp
